outfit_info.outfit_description: This urban ensemble layers a black shearling-trimmed bomber jacket over a striped long-sleeve tee, paired with brown cargo jeans. A navy beanie and chunky white sneakers complete the casual yet sophisticated vibe. A malachite necklace and phone case add refined, street-ready accents.

model_attributes.body: The model has a slender, athletic build with a sharp jawline and an intense, focused expression, conveying confidence.
model_attributes.pose: The model strikes a dynamic, slightly crouched pose with clenched fists and legs apart, exuding an energetic and assertive attitude.
model_attributes.background: The background is a dimly lit, graffiti-covered arched tunnel featuring ornate golden chandeliers and a modern DJ setup, flanked by an engaged audience.

outfit.P00442628: black leather phone case with logo
